indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX customer_pipeline_stages_pipeline_position_idx ON public.customer_pipeline_stages USING btree (pipeline_id, "position")

title_variables.name: title_variables
title_variables.comment: Variables for i18n interpolation in title

body_variables.name: body_variables
body_variables.comment: Variables for i18n interpolation in body

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX notifications_expires_idx ON public.notifications USING btree (expires_at) WHERE ((expires_at IS NOT NULL) AND (status <> ALL (ARRAY['actioned'::text, 'dismissed'::text])))
CREATE INDEX notifications_group_idx ON public.notifications USING btree (group_key, recipient_user_id) WHERE (group_key IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX notifications_source_idx ON public.notifications USING btree (source_entity_type, source_entity_id) WHERE (source_entity_id IS NOT NULL)
